mapper.select: select id, venue_id, slot_date, start_time, end_time, max_capacity, available_capacity, status, create_time, update_time from venue_slot where id = #{slotId} limit 1
mapper.update: update venue_slot set available_capacity = available_capacity - #{personCount}, status = case when available_capacity - #{personCount} = 0 then 2 else 1 end where id = #{slotId} and status = 1 and available_capacity >= #{personCount}
update venue_slot set available_capacity = available_capacity + #{personCount}, status = 1 where id = #{slotId}
mapper.insert: insert into booking ( booking_no, user_id, venue_id, slot_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, person_count, status, breach_flag, remark ) values ( #{bookingNo}, #{userId}, #{venueId}, #{slotId}, #{bookingDate}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{personCount}, #{status}, #{breachFlag}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: select id, booking_no, user_id, venue_id, slot_id, booking_date, start_time, end_time, person_count, status, cancel_reason, checkin_time, breach_flag, remark, create_time, update_time from booking where id = #{id} limit 1
mapper.update: update booking set status = 3, cancel_reason = #{cancelReason}, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and status = 1
